goalsManagement.title: Goals Management
goalsManagement.subtitle: Track Tu progreso and historial.
goalsManagement.createGoalDesc: Set Nuevo nutrition targets and macros
goalsManagement.createCheckinDesc: Añadir a Nuevo nutrition check-in entry
goalsManagement.emptyStateMessage: Crear a Nuevo objetivo to get started
goalsManagement.deleteGoalMessage: This objetivo will be permanently removed from Tu historial.

goalCreationMethod.title: Nuevo objetivo
goalCreationMethod.subtitle: How would you like to set up Tu Nuevo objetivo?
goalCreationMethod.guidedDescription: We'll guide you step-by-step to the right calorie and macro targets.
goalCreationMethod.manualDescription: Enter Tu calories, macros, and targets directly.
goalCreationMethod.autoCalculateDescription: We calculate Tu targets using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula based on Tu perfil.

goalType.title: What's Tu main objetivo?
goalType.subtitle: This helps us recommend the right calorie and macro targets for you.
goalType.loseDescription: Reduce body fat through a calorie deficit.
goalType.maintainDescription: Keep Tu current weight and body composition.
goalType.gainDescription: Build muscle and strength with a calorie surplus.

goalWeight.subtitle: Set the weight you want to reach. Tu current weight is shown for reference.
goalWeight.label: objetivo Weight
goalWeight.tipLoseBF: Aiming for 0.5–1% of Tu body weight per week is a sustainable rate that helps preserve muscle mass during a cut.
goalWeight.tipGain: Gaining 0.25–0.5 kg per week keeps fat gain minimal while still allowing steady muscle growth.

targetDate.title: When do you want to reach Tu objetivo?
targetDate.subtitle: Setting a deadline helps you track Tu progreso over time.
targetDate.label: Fecha objetivo

manageCheckinData.title: Nutrition Check-ins
manageCheckinData.noCheckinsDesc: Check-ins are created when you set up an AI-calculated nutrition objetivo
